The design could also launch a new class of aerial-aquatic drones and vehicles. https://news.mit.edu/2026/new-flapping-robot-swims-and-flies-like-diving-bird-0709
tweets.content:
Inspired by naturally aquatic aviators, engineers at MIT and EPFL in Lausanne, Switzerland, have designed a robot that can swim underwater, then flap out of the water to continue flying through air, much like diving birds. The design could also launch a new class of aerial-aquatic drones and vehicles. news.mit.edu/2026/new-flappi…

New flapping robot swims and flies like a diving bird

Researchers designed a robot that can swim underwater, then flap out of the water to continue flying through air, much like diving birds.
